key_risks: Sticky core/headline CPI (June print July 14) or hawkish rate repricing could hit high-beta semis and momentum hardest.
Crowded momentum/semiconductor positioning is vulnerable to a sharp factor rotation or AI-spending growth scare.
Geopolitical or trade shock affecting Taiwan/semiconductor supply chains.
Higher 10-year yields (4.5%) pressuring richly valued growth multiples before exit.

portfolio.rationale: Strong sustained momentum (+16% 30d, +86% 6m) with AI demand intact; leading group with positive 7d action while broad market wobbles.
Benchmark core anchor given sticky inflation and only modest Fed easing path; reduces active risk where edge is weak.
Persistent factor leadership (+13.8% 30d, +3.5% 7d) likely to continue into July absent a regime break.
Solid breadth, positive 7d/30d trend, Philly Fed new orders strong; cyclical participation with lower volatility than tech.
Semiconductor supply-chain leverage with strong momentum (+15% 30d, +5% 7d) and global electronics demand.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward durable semiconductor/momentum leadership while anchoring with the S&P 500 benchmark, given sticky inflation, a higher-for-longer Fed, and resilient growth data that favor continuation over reversal.
rationale_summary: Combine AI/semiconductor and momentum continuation with a benchmark core and cyclical industrials for a balanced pro-trend stance into the July exit.
